variants.title: HiFi Filter DO 1000 Urea Complete Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SABH 554
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter DO 1000 Urea Complete Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SABH 554
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter DO 1000 Urea Complete Filter is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SABH 554. Easy to install and replace, the DO 1000 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: UREA COMPLETE FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 143.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 133.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 111.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): 1"-BSP, Thread 2 (D8): 1"-BSP, Height 1 (H1): 110.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 100.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 63.0 mm
